description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files at $HOME/.cache/pip with a cache key of $CI_PROJECT_NAME, uses a postgres:latest service (identified by its SHA) and defines PostgreSQL variables POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD. Include the external components gitlab.com/thelabnyc/thelab-ci-components for review, precommit, publish-gitlab-release, and publish-to-pypi. Define two stages, test and release, and set workflow rules to run only on protected branches or merge‑request events. In the test stage add a test job that runs on the image registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE} with a parallel matrix of three Python versions (3.12, 3.13, 3.14) each setting a TOX_SKIP_ENV pattern, and executes the shell commands `uv sync` then `uv run tox`, reporting coverage with the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/. The included components provide review, pre‑commit checks and publishing of releases to GitLab and PyPI.
